headline: S&P Global Deepens Capital IQ Pro Role With New AI And Drift AI
summary: S&P Global (NYSE:SPGI) has rolled out major AI driven upgrades to its Capital IQ Pro platform, including new analytics tools and broader datasets across key asset classes. The company has also acquired Drift AI, an AI focused firm, to deepen its capabilities in research, workflow automation, and financial data analysis. These moves mark a material step for Capital IQ Pro users as AI powered tools become more embedded in day to day investment and risk workflows. S&P Global, trading at around...
